summary: Express Void & Audit Protocol Implementation - All tests PASSED. Feature working correctly: Pending items use Express Void (direct deletion, no dialog), Sent items use Audit Protocol (requires reason/PIN dialog).
passed_tests: Frontend: No trash icons (Trash2) in item rows - CONFIRMED
Frontend: Select PENDING item + click Anular -> Express Void (no dialog, direct deletion)
Frontend: Select SENT item + click Anular -> Audit Protocol dialog appears (requires PIN)
Frontend: Item selection shows red checkbox and 'Anular (n)' button
Backend: POST /api/orders/{id}/cancel-items with express_void=true succeeds for pending items
Backend: POST /api/orders/{id}/cancel-items with express_void=true returns 400 for sent items
Backend: Audit Protocol (express_void=false) succeeds with valid reason for sent items
Backend: Cancellation reasons endpoint returns list with requires_manager_auth flag
critical_code_review_comments: handleSmartVoid correctly determines Express Void vs Audit Protocol based on item status
handleExpressVoid calls API with express_void=true flag
Backend cancel_multiple_items validates express_void only allowed for pending items
Trash2 import exists but is NOT used in item rows (only in other places like 'Anular' button text)
seed_data_creation: Added Presidente item (pending) for Express Void test, then cancelled via Express Void
context_for_next_testing_agent: Express Void and Audit Protocol system is fully functional. Express Void works for pending items (no dialog, direct deletion). Audit Protocol works for sent items (shows dialog requiring reason selection and possibly manager PIN). No trash icons in item rows - items use checkbox selection + ANULAR button at bottom.

features_verified.no_trash_icons_in_rows: PASS - Trash2 icon removed from item rows, items use checkbox selection
features_verified.express_void_pending_items: PASS - Pending items deleted directly without dialog
features_verified.audit_protocol_sent_items: PASS - Sent items show Autorización de Gerente dialog
features_verified.backend_express_void_validation: PASS - API returns 400 if express_void=true for sent items
features_verified.backend_audit_protocol: PASS - API accepts cancellation with reason for sent items

flow_tested.express_void_flow: Table 2 -> Add Presidente (pending) -> Select -> Click ANULAR -> Item deleted (no dialog)
flow_tested.audit_protocol_flow: Table 2 -> Select Bohemia (sent) -> Click ANULAR -> Dialog shows with PIN keypad
